message:
feat(metal): Add precompiled Metal shader support

- Update metal_backend.m to load precompiled .metallib files
- Add fallback to runtime compilation if no .metallib found
- Add zig build metal-shaders step (requires Xcode)
- Fix variable naming conflict in vector_search.metal (dot -> dot_product)
- Search multiple paths for .metallib (zig-out/lib, src/metal, bundle)

Build: zig build metal-shaders
Output: zig-out/lib/vector_search.metallib (17KB)

Benefits:
- Faster startup (no runtime shader compilation)
- Build-time error checking
- Catches syntax errors at build time instead of runtime
